name: wqi-transfers-subgraph
description: Example subgraph indexing Wrapped Qi (WQI) ERC-20 transfers on Quai Cyprus-1.

scripts.deploy-local: graph deploy --node http://localhost:8020/ --ipfs http://localhost:5001 wqi-transfers --version-label v0.0.1
scripts.deploy-mainnet: graph deploy --node https://graph.quai.network/deploy --ipfs https://ipfs.qu.ai wqi-transfers --version-label v0.0.1
